creator: kle@bluewin.ch
text:
For the overall attention I had here the recent information that clover is as of March 2025 regarded as deprecated. So it looks that it will be removed in Mesa 25.1.

Until recently, the consensus was to wait with the deletion of clover until rusticl is also available for the r600 Mesa driver.

But it looks that this has now changed, further information can be found at the corresponding Mesa MR:

https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/mesa/mesa/-/merge_requests/19385
